events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the observed condition (rebar touching form/ground = zero cover) is a clear **fail** against ACI 318 cover requirements and ACI 117 placement tolerances — high risk if concrete were placed as-is (corrosion, loss of fire resistance, reduced structural capacity), but correctable at this rough-complete stage by adding proper chairs/bolsters/spacers and re-verifying cover before pour.
